data.title: TAL Education Q3 earnings beat estimates by 317%, with EPS at $0.25 vs. $0.06. Revenue up by $163.72 million.
data.description: TAL Education (NYSE: TAL) released its Q3 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 04:00 AM. The earnings report revealed that TAL Education surpassed estimated earnings by an impressive 317.0%, with an EPS of $0.25 compared to the estimated $0.06. Revenue showed a significant increase of $163.72 million from the previous year. Looking at past earnings, the company consistently outperformed expectations on EPS. Explore more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: KuCoin EU launches MiCAR-compliant platform in 29 EEA markets. Regulated crypto access in Europe.
data.description: Vienna, January 29, 2026 - KuCoin EU has announced the introduction of its MiCAR-compliant cryptocurrency platform for users in 29 European Economic Area (EEA) markets. This marks a significant progression in providing regulated access to digital assets in Europe. The platform will be available to users in 29 EEA markets.
